{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211312576384E116E768DAAD4B31"}"},"total":389},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7253481696715211578","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看看后续发展吧，是我喜欢的类型，但是跟之前看过的一本女尊帝夫情况类似，过于着重描写战争之类的事情，其实奔着本书来的目标都很明确，就看后续情节发展了，作者加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1688832946,"group_id":"7223291907902802978","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"赚不到钱，那就下海！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N765biqvSA1RqrGDaj8w+UKqHJuNOG5v5Liqq7AH1kc3","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3a942e2812a5467ab50fc80065197a2e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618311&x-signature=TlyfnZbHEfOIfIwqvniYGbMgyQY%3D","user_id":"3606010680840541","user_name":"苍仙君"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3606010680840541","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7223291907902802978","book_info":{"abstract":"又名：《这国师我是一天也待不下去了》《这个世界上的女人都好阔怕！》（正文已完结）
柯启鸿穿越了，有一个好消息和一个坏消息
好消息：这里是架空历史世界，他可以凭借一些先进技术思想及文抄公活下去
坏消息：女尊世界
当他凭借科举一战成名，为求自保自强，辅助太子坐上皇位，当上国师时，却发现女帝看他的眼神有点不对劲
柯启鸿：陛下，请您三思！
凤婉雪：不是国师教导我，有喜欢的东西就要去奋斗，去争取，去把它牢牢攥在手里吗？况且，国师你也不想让人知道，你男扮女装的事情吧？
柯启鸿：完了
